suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow an explicit evidence-capture-only exception to the failing-tests-first rule, as long as the worker records why no user-facing code changed and still completes the required headed-browser verification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `investor-visual-enhanced-path-runtime-smoothness-evidence` found a justified deviation because the fix only committed headed-browser runtime evidence and made no application code change, yet the current skill still frames failing tests as mandatory for every feature.

rejectedObservations.observation: The content-strategy-worker skill still overstates procedure adherence because fix workers reported `followedProcedure=true` without transcript-visible `.factory/library/*.md` reads before the first edit.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the prior round's suggested guidance update in `.factory/validation/investor-grade-mindmap-performance-valuation/scrutiny/synthesis.round3.json`; this rerun adds no new remediation beyond the already-documented orchestrator recommendation
